'''鈭歝h-sh-h''' ('''kachashah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whitestone|whitestone]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-sh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whitestone|whitestone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-sh-h
|-
! Lemma
| kachashah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichashah|thichashah]] || [[word:jichashah|jichashah]] || [[word:shichashah|shichashah]] || [[word:kichashah|kichashah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchashah|thuthuchashah]] || [[word:jujuchashah|jujuchashah]] || [[word:shushuchashah|shushuchashah]] || [[word:kukuchashah|kukuchashah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchashah|thuchashah]] || [[word:juchashah|juchashah]] || [[word:shuchashah|shuchashah]] || [[word:kuchashah|kuchashah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchashah|thuchashah]] || [[word:juchashah|juchashah]] || [[word:shuchashah|shuchashah]] || [[word:kuchashah|kuchashah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechashah|thechashah]] || [[word:jechashah|jechashah]] || [[word:shechashah|shechashah]] || [[word:kechashah|kechashah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochashah|thothochashah]] || [[word:jojochashah|jojochashah]] || [[word:shoshochashah|shoshochashah]] || [[word:kokochashah|kokochashah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochashah|thochashah]] || [[word:jochashah|jochashah]] || [[word:shochashah|shochashah]] || [[word:kochashah|kochashah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochashah|thochashah]] || [[word:jochashah|jochashah]] || [[word:shochashah|shochashah]] || [[word:kochashah|kochashah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chashah|chashah]] || [[word:chashah|chashah]] || [[word:chashah|chashah]] || [[word:chashah|chashah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chashah|chashah]] || [[word:chashah|chashah]] || [[word:chashah|chashah]] || [[word:chashah|chashah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chashah|chashah]] || [[word:chashah|chashah]] || [[word:chashah|chashah]] || [[word:chashah|chashah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chashah|chashah]] || [[word:chashah|chashah]] || [[word:chashah|chashah]] || [[word:chashah|chashah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chashah|th忙chashah]] || [[word:j忙chashah|j忙chashah]] || [[word:sh忙chashah|sh忙chashah]] || [[word:k忙chashah|k忙chashah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachashah|thathachashah]] || [[word:jajachashah|jajachashah]] || [[word:shashachashah|shashachashah]] || [[word:kakachashah|kakachashah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachashah|thachashah]] || [[word:jachashah|jachashah]] || [[word:shachashah|shachashah]] || [[word:kachashah|kachashah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachashah|thachashah]] || [[word:jachashah|jachashah]] || [[word:shachashah|shachashah]] || [[word:kachashah|kachashah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachashah|shachashah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachashah|goshachashah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachashah|gokishachashah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachashahn眉|shachashahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachashahnkn眉|goshachashahnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachashahn眉|gokishachashahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachashahsh毛|shachashahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachashahnksh毛|goshachashahnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachashahsh毛|gokishachashahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachashahro|shachashahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachashahnkro|goshachashahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachashahro|gokishachashahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachashahmu|shachashahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachashahnkmu|goshachashahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachashahmu|gokishachashahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachashahsher|shachashahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachashahnksher|goshachashahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachashahsher|gokishachashahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachashahng|shachashahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachashahnkng|goshachashahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachashahng|gokishachashahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachashahya|shachashahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachashahnkya|goshachashahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachashahya|gokishachashahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachashahyam|shachashahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachashahnkyam|goshachashahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachashahyam|gokishachashahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachashahn眉sh毛|shachashahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachashahnkn眉sh毛|goshachashahnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachashahn眉sh毛|gokishachashahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachashahn眉ro|shachashahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachashahnkn眉ro|goshachashahnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachashahn眉ro|gokishachashahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachashahn眉mu|shachashahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachashahnkn眉mu|goshachashahnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachashahn眉mu|gokishachashahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachashahsh毛n眉|shachashahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachashahnksh毛n眉|goshachashahnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachashahsh毛n眉|gokishachashahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachashahsh毛ro|shachashahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachashahnksh毛ro|goshachashahnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachashahsh毛ro|gokishachashahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachashahsh毛mu|shachashahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachashahnksh毛mu|goshachashahnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachashahsh毛mu|gokishachashahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachashahron眉|shachashahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachashahnkron眉|goshachashahnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachashahron眉|gokishachashahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachashahrosh毛|shachashahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachashahnkrosh毛|goshachashahnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachashahrosh毛|gokishachashahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachashahromu|shachashahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachashahnkromu|goshachashahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachashahromu|gokishachashahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachashahmun眉|shachashahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachashahnkmun眉|goshachashahnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachashahmun眉|gokishachashahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachashahmush毛|shachashahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachashahnkmush毛|goshachashahnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachashahmush毛|gokishachashahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachashahmuro|shachashahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachashahnkmuro|goshachashahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachashahmuro|gokishachashahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
